scripts.build: pnpm clean && pnpm typecheck && electron-vite build
scripts.build:mac: pnpm build && pnpm build:core && electron-builder --mac dmg pkg zip
scripts.build:win: pnpm build && pnpm build:core && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.build:linux: pnpm build && pnpm build:core && electron-builder --linux AppImage tar.gz
scripts.release:mac: pnpm build && pnpm build:core && electron-builder --mac dmg pkg zip --publish always
scripts.release:win: pnpm build && pnpm build:core && electron-builder --win nsis --publish always
scripts.release:linux: pnpm build && pnpm build:core && electron-builder --linux AppImage tar.gz --publish always
